[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 010000000 1
1 001010000 2
2 001001011 4
3 100111011 6
4 111011011 7
5 101100100 4
6 111001101 6
7 101100101 5

01 10 001000000 1
12 21 000001011 3
23 32 100011011 5
34 43 101000000 2
45 54 101000100 3
56 65 101000101 4
67 76 000000100 1
70 07 000000100 1

02 20 000010000 1
13 31 001001011 4 match 2
24 42 100100000 2
35 53 111001001 5
46 64 101100100 4 match 5
57 75 010000100 2
60 06 001000100 2
71 17 000000000 a

03 30 001010000 2 match 1
14 41 001000000 1
25 52 100001001 3
36 63 101000001 3
47 74 000000100 1
50 05 001000100 2
61 16 001000001 2
72 27 000000000 a

04 40 001000100 2
15 51 001001001 3
26 62 100100001 3
37 73 010000000 1 match 0
